history.content:
<thought>
I am at cell row02 colB facing east. The cell directly ahead (row02 colC) is lava, so moving forward is impossible. Turning left would face north into a wall (row01 colB is #). Therefore, the only viable action is to turn right to face south. After turning, I can proceed to move forward to row03 colB.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02, column B, facing down. The goal is at row 04, column D. My immediate forward cell (row 03, column B) is empty and safe. Moving forward will get me closer to the goal without immediate danger. I should move forward first.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell (03, B) facing down. The goal is at (04, D), but there is lava at (04, C) blocking a direct rightward move. A safe path is to turn left to face right, then move right to (03, C), then right to (03, D), then turn right to face down, then move down to the goal. So my first action is to turn left.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 3, column B, facing right. The cell directly ahead (row 3, column C) is a floor cell ('.'), which is safe. I need to move towards the goal at row 4, column D. Moving forward now will bring me closer.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03, column C, facing right. The goal is at row 04, column D. Moving forward will take me to cell (03, D), which is empty floor. From there, I can turn and move down to the goal. No lava in the immediate forward path.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column D, facing right (>). The goal is at row 04 column D (G). To move down toward the goal, I need to change my orientation to face down. Turning right from right will face me down.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row3 column D facing down. The goal is directly below me at row4 column D. There are no obstacles in between. I can move forward to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
